summary: A USCIS Alien Registration Requirement (ARR) public service announcement titled 'Facing the Consequences', using branded title cards plus stock B-roll (handcuffs over a fingerprint card) under an instructional voiceover stating that failure to register makes one a priority for civil and criminal enforcement. It carries no music track. On-screen text reads 'ARR Alien Registration Requirement', 'FACING THE CONSEQUENCES', 'If you fail to comply, for civil and criminal enforcement', and 'FOR MORE INFO: USCIS.GOV/ALIENREGISTRATION'.
notable_text: ARR Alien Registration Requirement; FACING THE CONSEQUENCES; If you fail to comply, for civil and criminal enforcement; FOR MORE INFO: USCIS.GOV/ALIENREGISTRATION
